description: Referencing the tempting beauty of the apple, this flacon of this Red Delicious  for men from dkny is a delectable goid in shape.  The composition consists of notes of sweet fresh bergamot with cardamom, tangerine, oxygen, brandy and rum. The heart has notes of saffron, coffee, apple liqueur, and orchid. The base is sandal and vanilla.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
